game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Katana ZERO is a stylish neo-noir, action-platformer featuring breakneck action and instant-death combat. Slash, dash, and manipulate time to unravel your past in a beautifully brutal acrobatic display. Katana ZERO is a stylish neo-noir, action-platformer featuring breakneck action and instant-death combat. Slash, dash, and manipulate time to unravel your past in a beautifully brutal acrobatic display.

Exceptional Combat: Overcome your opposition however the situation requires. Deflect gunfire back at foes, dodge oncoming attacks, and manipulate enemies and environments with traps and explosives. Leave no survivors.

Hand-Crafted Sequences: Each level is uniquely designed for countless methods of completion. Defeat foes creatively, using spontaneous approaches to eliminate your enemy as you see fit.

Unconventional Storytelling: An enigmatic story told through cinematic sequences woven into the gameplay, twisting and folding to an unexpected conclusion.
game_info.description: You are a samurai assassin with the ability to manipulate time. Navigate through enemy-filled rooms, slashing foes with your katana, dodging bullets, and using your time-slow ability strategically. One hit kills—for you and your enemies. Clear all enemies to progress through increasingly challenging levels. Master timing, positioning, and the art of the blade to survive.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, crouch (down), look up (up)
Space: Jump
Shift: Dash (fast horizontal movement with brief invincibility)
Z: Slash with katana (hold direction to slash in that direction)
X: Activate time-slow ability (limited duration, recharges between levels)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat mechanics test. Validates that the player can move, jump, slash enemies, and that collision detection works correctly. Tests fundamental gameplay loop.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through the level using basic controls. Approach enemies and use slash attacks to eliminate them. Test jumping and basic positioning. Avoid getting hit while clearing enemies systematically.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, jumps, and slashes enemies. Enemies are eliminated when hit. Player avoids damage and completes at least the first level. Test is successful when basic mechanics function without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy test. Implements advanced tactics including dash, time-slow, and optimal positioning to efficiently clear all levels and achieve victory condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use dash for quick positioning and invincibility frames. Activate time-slow when facing multiple enemies or projectiles. Slash enemies efficiently by approaching from advantageous angles. Clear all enemies in each level to progress through all stages.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state by completing all levels. All enemies are eliminated efficiently using advanced mechanics. Test demonstrates that the win condition is achievable through skilled play.

TEST_3.test_description: Projectile dodging and deflection test. Validates that the player can avoid or deflect enemy bullets, and that bullet mechanics work correctly including collision and timing.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Focus on enemies that shoot projectiles. Use time-slow to dodge bullets more easily. Attempt to slash bullets to deflect them back at enemies. Test positioning and timing to avoid getting hit.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully dodges bullets using movement and time-slow. Deflected bullets hit and eliminate enemies. Test is successful when projectile mechanics work correctly and player can survive bullet-heavy scenarios.

TEST_4.test_description: Dash invincibility test. Validates that the dash ability provides temporary invincibility and can be used to pass through hazards safely.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Use dash to move through enemy attacks and projectiles. Test dash timing to avoid damage during the invincibility window. Use dash strategically to reposition quickly in dangerous situations.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player takes no damage while dashing through attacks. Dash cooldown works correctly. Test demonstrates that dash provides reliable defensive option and mobility enhancement.
